hero.eyebrow: AI consulting for healthcare and pharma
title: Making artificial
intelligence
tangible in healthcare
hero.subtitle: EvolvIA Health helps pharmaceutical labs, hospitals and healthtech adopt artificial intelligence, strategically and operationally. AI that is useful, understandable and grounded in the realities of the field.

trust.label: Moving forward with us
trust.title: Healthcare and pharma are embracing AI. We make it concrete
trust.partnersLabel: Serving the players of pharmaceutical and digital health

manifesto.label: Our conviction
manifesto.text: AI in healthcare is not a technological promise. It is a field discipline, serving the caregiver, the patient and the decision.

services.label: Services
services.title: Four levers to turn AI into an operational advantage

items.title: Frame a credible AI strategy, from POC to industrialization.
items.body: For pharmaceutical labs and healthtech startups ready to move beyond experimentation. Roadmap, governance, prioritization of high-impact use cases.

items.title: Design AI agents that are useful, understandable and embedded in the field.
items.body: Intelligent assistants calibrated to your protocols, data and workflows. No tech magic — measurable usefulness serving healthcare professionals.

items.title: Train your teams in the business uses of generative AI.
items.body: Programs tailored for healthcare professionals. Concrete uses, critical mindset, data hygiene. From awareness to operational mastery.

items.title: Transform organizations sustainably, by and with AI.
items.body: Adoption, continuous use-case exploration, impact measurement. AI changes nothing without a solid human and operational framework.

capabilities.label: AI capabilities, state of the art 2026
capabilities.title: What AI can do for healthcare
capabilities.subtitle: An honest map: what works today, what is emerging, what does not work yet.

items.title: Medical RAG
items.desc: Synthesis of scientific corpora in seconds. Mature, deployable today.

items.title: Autonomous agents
items.desc: Orchestrated multi-step workflows. Emerging, with supervised use cases.

items.title: Multimodal
items.desc: Medical imaging, text and voice combined. Very promising in R&D, to validate case by case.

items.title: Reasoning
items.desc: Explainable reasoning on diagnoses. For copilot use, never autonomous.

items.title: Fine-tuning
items.desc: Specialisation on your data. ROI often lower than a well-designed RAG.

items.title: Generation
items.desc: Reports, monographs, training. Well adopted with human validation.

items.label: Target team productivity on medical RAG use cases

about.title: A conviction turned into a firm
about.subtitle: EvolvIA Health was born from the insight that AI will only create value in healthcare if it is designed by those who understand its field complexity.
about.missionTitle: Supporting the concrete integration of AI in healthcare
about.missionText: Improving operational performance, decision-making, team productivity and responsible innovation. That is the mandate we set ourselves with every client.
about.visionTitle: The reference partner for AI transformation in French healthcare
about.visionText: Not the biggest. The most rigorous. The one innovation directors of labs, hospitals and healthtech call when AI becomes strategic.

values.title: Useful, not spectacular
values.desc: AI that transforms a workflow beats AI that makes headlines.

values.title: Sovereignty by design
values.desc: European data, European models where possible. No compromise on confidentiality.

values.title: Scientific rigour
values.desc: Metrics, evaluations, audits. We measure what we promise.

values.title: Transmission
values.desc: You always leave more autonomous. That is our best recommendation.

services.title: Five areas of expertise. One conviction
services.subtitle: From strategic diagnosis to deploying custom AI agents, we cover the entire value chain of adoption.

items.title: Defining your AI trajectory
items.desc: AI maturity diagnosis, mapping of high-value use cases, multi-year roadmap. A clear vision before the first technical pilot.

items.title: Specialised assistants
items.desc: Design and deployment of AI agents trained on your proprietary data and integrated into your business workflows, from prototype to scale.

items.title: Building skills
items.desc: Tailored programmes for your medical, R&D and operational teams. From awareness to advanced prompt engineering.

items.title: Lasting adoption
items.desc: AI only succeeds if teams adopt it. Change management, alignment, internal communication to turn a POC into a standard.

items.title: Exploring the frontiers
items.desc: Technology watch, exploration of emerging use cases, design fiction workshops. Preparing tomorrow by integrating today's building blocks.

services.ctaSubtitle: Describe your project. We propose a structured approach within 48h.

useCases.title: Where AI makes the difference
useCases.subtitle: Concrete examples of transformations led by EvolvIA Health, anonymised to respect our clients' confidentiality.

items.title: Documentary review accelerated 5×
items.desc: A medical RAG set up on 12,000 proprietary scientific publications. Medical teams obtain clinical syntheses in seconds instead of hours.

items.title: Automated medical reports
items.desc: An assistant integrated into the hospital information system that generates a first draft of consultation report from voice notes. Doctors keep 100% control and save administrative time.

items.title: Medical RAG pilot in 4 weeks
items.desc: An internal assistant trained on proprietary documentation, deployed for sales teams. Onboarding 2× faster, measurably higher client answer quality.

useCases.ctaSubtitle: Every organisation has its specifics. Let's discuss yours.

approach.title: From strategic brief to deployment
approach.subtitle: Five structured phases. Clear deliverables at each milestone. No black box: you stay in control at every step.

phases.title: Strategic framing
phases.desc: Discovery workshop (1h30). In-depth competitive benchmark. Mapping of priority use cases. Definition of personas and target. Validation of regulatory constraints.

phases.title: Architecture and technical framing
phases.desc: Definition of target architecture. Choice of foundation models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, local models). Data sovereignty framing. HDS validation if applicable.

phases.title: Design
phases.desc: Interactive prototypes. User experience design. Integration into business workflows. Qualitative testing with target users.

phases.title: Development and iterations
phases.desc: Agile build in one-week sprints. Weekly user testing. Integration with existing systems. Hardening and load testing.

phases.title: Launch and transmission
phases.desc: Progressive deployment. Team training. Comprehensive documentation. 4-week post-delivery hotline included.

checkpoints.title: Strategic brief validated
checkpoints.desc: You approve or decline. No next phase before alignment.

checkpoints.title: Prototypes validated
checkpoints.desc: Functional demonstration. Adjustments before the build.

approach.ctaLead: You have seen how we work.
approach.ctaTitle: Let's build your next AI agent together
approach.ctaSubtitle: Book a meeting with our experts, or request a free quote. Reply within 48 business hours.

insights.title: Healthcare and pharma in the age of AI
insights.subtitle: Continuous monitoring and our perspective on artificial intelligence, digital health and the pharmaceutical industry.
insights.comingNote: Our next analysis, "Medical RAG: why 80% of projects still fail", is coming in the next few weeks.

founder.metaDescription: EvolvIA Health was born from field experience in pharmaceutical consulting. Discover the vision, the journey and Prometheus, our proprietary AI agent.
founder.title: A vision, a firm, an agent
founder.subtitle: EvolvIA Health was born from experience in digital transformation consulting in the pharmaceutical industry, with a strong conviction: AI must be useful, understandable and grounded in the realities of the field.
founder.founderHeading: From pharma consulting to applied AI
founder.founderBio: After several years in digital transformation in the pharmaceutical industry, the founder of EvolvIA Health created this firm to bridge the gap between the promise of AI and its real adoption in the field. Her conviction: no AI transformation succeeds without a fine understanding of the clinical, regulatory and human constraints of the healthcare sector.
founder.photoAlt: Portrait of the founder of EvolvIA Health
founder.schoolNote: Admitted to a leading business school, specialising in healthcare and strategy.
founder.growthNote: The firm intends to surround itself with healthcare and data experts to grow alongside its clients.

timeline.title: Founder & CEO, EvolvIA Health
timeline.desc: Creation of the firm. Supporting pharma labs and hospitals in the strategic adoption of generative AI and autonomous agents.

timeline.title: Senior consultant, pharma digital transformation
timeline.desc: Leading digital and data transformation projects within consulting firms. Progressive specialisation on AI topics.

timeline.title: Leading business school, healthcare specialisation
timeline.desc: Management education, complemented by sector expertise in the pharmaceutical and hospital industry.

founder.prometheeLabText: Prometheus is the AI agent we develop internally to experiment, test and harden the patterns we propose to our clients. Not a commercial product, but a living lab that guarantees we know what we are talking about.
founder.prometheeLabQuote: Prometheus is our guarantee that we never recommend what we have not tested ourselves.

promethee.extraNote: Prometheus is our living lab: we internally test the patterns we recommend to clients, so we never advise what we have not experienced ourselves.
